positive: A stylized, geometric depiction of a majestic, mythical forest creature (like a griffin or phoenix hybrid) taking flight against a clean, gradient sky background. The artwork must feature strong, contrasting silhouettes in deep jewel tones (sapphire blue, emerald green, ruby red) paired with sharp gold accents. The composition is centralized, creating a striking vertical or circular design suitable for a T-shirt print. Use intricate line art elements mixed with solid, flat color areas, giving it a modern, heraldic, and minimalist aesthetic. Conceptually inspired by Art Deco and mystical folk art, highly detailed etching style, vector graphic quality, high contrast, clean edges, suitable for apparel print.
negative: blur, noise, low resolution, text, watermark, signature, debris, multiple subjects, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, jpeg artifacts, writing, logo, trademark, messy, complex background details
